failure_reason: Cited blocks p003_c0013 ('78% of households do not own a car') and p003_c0011 ('Within a ¼ mile:') do not mention the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor. The connection to corridor_first-second-avenues-brt is supplied entirely by the slide's header/title context, which are not cited blocks. Co-occurrence in a document is not a relation.

Cited blocks p003_c0014 ('57% of residents commute by transit') and p003_c0011 ('Within a ¼ mile:') do not name the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor. The connection to corridor_first-second-avenues-brt comes from the slide's header context, not from the cited block text itself.

Cited blocks p020_c0005 ('M15 Select Bus Service') and p020_c0006 ('Over 10 miles of new or improved bus lanes') do not state that the project has/added this metric. The relationship is inferred from heading/bullet slide layout; neither block text explicitly connects the project to the metric.

Same pattern as rel-006: p020_c0005 and p020_c0009 co-occur on the project summary slide but the text does not state that M15 SBS adds over six miles of bike lanes. Block text only shows co-occurrence, not a stated relation.
Same pattern as rel-006/rel-007: p020_c0005 and p020_c0010 co-occur on the slide but the block text does not state that the M15 SBS project delivered over 50 pedestrian safety islands.

Two failures: (1) Neither p003_c0009 ('Bus speeds have been declining') nor p003_c0007 ('Currently served by M15 bus route') states the connection to route_m15-sbs — they merely co-occur on the overview slide. (2) Service-variant mismatch: p003_c0007 refers to the pre-SBS 'M15 bus route' (the presentation is June 2010, SBS launched October 2010), but the subject route_m15-sbs is the SBS variant. The declining-speed claim applies to the pre-SBS M15 local/limited service, not the future SBS service.

Same dual failure as rel-009: (1) p003_c0010 ('Ridership has been decreasing') and p003_c0007 do not state the connection to route_m15-sbs in the text — co-occurrence is insufficient. (2) Service-variant mismatch: p003_c0007 refers to the pre-SBS M15 bus route, but the subject is route_m15-sbs (SBS variant launched October 2010). The base record claim_ridership-decreasing has source '2010_02_25_brt_1st2nd_cb8', confirming pre-SBS context.

Cited block p016_c0008 describes 'the 2010 plan for First Avenue parking regulations' but never mentions 'Select Bus Service,' 'SBS,' 'M15,' or the project by name. The connection to project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010 comes from the slide deck's overall context (page 16 header: '+selectbuservice first avenue/second avenue'), not from the cited block text itself.

Same pattern as rel-011: p017_c0008 describes 'the 2010 plan for parking regulations on Second Avenue' but does not mention the SBS project. The block text provides no stated connection to project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010.

Cited blocks p003_c0006 ('Service begins October 2010 8.5 miles from South Ferry to 125 th Street') and p020_c0004 ('October 2010') do not name 'M15 Select Bus Service' or 'First Avenue/Second Avenue.' The connection to project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010 is inferred from the slide's header context, not stated in the cited block text.

Cited block p019_c0007 ('CAC #5 - Mid-summer 2010') does not name the project. 'CAC' is not expanded in the block and no project identifier appears. The connection to project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010 relies on the slide deck context, not the cited text.

Cited block p019_c0008 ('Open House #2 - September 2010') does not name the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project. The connection to project_first-second-ave-sbs-2010 is not stated in the cited block text.

The cited block p019_c0005 ('Street resurfacing begins this month on First Avenue') does not state any connection to the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS project. It mentions neither SBS, M15, Select Bus Service, nor the project. The connection is only inferred from the slide deck context (the page header says '+selectbuservice first avenue/second avenue'), which is co-occurrence in a document, not a stated relation in the block text.

Neither cited block states a connection to the SBS project. Block p018_c0006 ('June - September') is only a date range. Block p018_c0007 ('Milling') is only a construction activity name. Neither mentions SBS, M15, Select Bus Service, First Avenue, Second Avenue, or the project. The connection comes only from the slide's page header ('+selectbussservice first avenue/second avenue') and section title, which is co-occurrence in a document, not a stated relation in the cited block text.
